full_text:
Wei Xi (Ziya) 隗禧 (子牙)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wei Xi (隗禧), styledZiya (子牙), was born in Jingzhao. Fond of learning and could recite the classics by heart. One of the Seven Confucian Exemplars. Wei Xi was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
